text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Honeyade, honeyade, honeyade! If you have
some sweeeet honeyade! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You can run, you can run, you can run! Till
youuu're number one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I don't think there's any link between drinking
honeyade and becoming faster...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah there is! I'm living proof of it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, could I get a honeyade? Make it a
thick, rich, extra!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I will have thin, medium, and medium for mine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! You can't go wrong with some honeyade
after training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. But I do wonder just how many calories
are in this...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Honeyade? Well, if ya want some, I can go for
one.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks... Excuse me, could I have one Extra
Loaded Super Swirl?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What?! You think dis is some have-it-your-way
type o' place?! No way they got that on da menu!

text_block_list.name: Honeyade Staff
text_block_list.text:
Of course you can! ♪ Here's your Extra Loaded
Super Swirl Honeyade!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: IT'S REAL?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ack... I kinda hurt my throat back there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Then have some of my honeyade. It's sure to
make you feel better.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I dunno, it looks pretty thick... I'll just take a sip...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dat's sweeeeet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The drink she ordered sounds... extraordinary.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know that was on the menu! Let's order it
next time we come!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I cannot! That surely counts well over a single
serving.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then we can share it! We can drink it all if it's the
two of us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I suppose, but only once, you hear?
